FLOW.COMMENT: this service needs to store these in a database

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: getActiveDocAttributes - get document attributes from TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT SENDER_TP_ALIAS, RECEIVER_TP_ALIAS, ... FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: SELECT SENDER_TP_ALIAS, RECEIVER_TP_ALIAS, DOCUMENT_ID, MESSAGE_ID, ORDER_NUM, OTHER_NUM1,OTHER_NUM2,OTHER_NUM3,OTHER_NUM4 FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

INVOKE.NAME: sRows != 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0527 No record found for sFwTransactionid='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: FE0527 No record found for sFwTransactionid='%sFwTransactionid%'

MAP.COMMENT: extract document attributes from the first record
